name: Construction (Zimbabwe)
definition: Businesses that construct, alter or maintain buildings and civil infrastructure, including contractors, specialist trades and property developers.

subSectors.name: Civil engineering
subSectors.description: Roads, bridges, dams, water and sanitation works.

subSectors.name: Specialist trades
subSectors.description: Plumbing, roofing, tiling, painting and similar subcontract trades.

subSectors.name: Property development
subSectors.description: Developers financing and delivering land and building projects.

subSectors.name: Built-environment consultancies
subSectors.description: Quantity surveying, architecture and engineering practices serving projects (professional registration regimes not covered in this seed).

typicalBusinessSizes.description: Small contractors handling minor works and subcontracts.
Registered contractors delivering full building or civils contracts.
National and regional contractors on major public and private works.

officialSizeThresholds.note: Official contractor categorisation bands and MSME thresholds were not verified from an official source in this revision; source the current classification before product use.

notes: Descriptive segmentation for product design; not an official statistical classification. Brickmaking and aggregates supply sit between manufacturing/mining and construction and are excluded from this seed.
